tags.name: Toilets of Minuteman NHP Meriams Corner

tags.description: Bathrooms are inside the visitor center
A Portland Loo permanent toilet. Includes hand sanitizer inside and a hand wash station outside. Dimly lighted, but has louvers at top and bottom to allow light in.

tags.description: Located on the second floor of the Simons

You may need to ask an mbta worker to unlock
